1→import { last } from './utils'
     2→import type { MatchLocation } from './RouterProvider'
     3→import type { AnyPathParams } from './route'
     4→
     5→export const SEGMENT_TYPE_PATHNAME = 0
     6→export const SEGMENT_TYPE_PARAM = 1
     7→export const SEGMENT_TYPE_WILDCARD = 2
     8→export const SEGMENT_TYPE_OPTIONAL_PARAM = 3
     9→
    10→export interface Segment {
    11→  readonly type:
    12→    | typeof SEGMENT_TYPE_PATHNAME
    13→    | typeof SEGMENT_TYPE_PARAM
    14→    | typeof SEGMENT_TYPE_WILDCARD
    15→    | typeof SEGMENT_TYPE_OPTIONAL_PARAM
    16→  readonly value: string
    17→  readonly prefixSegment?: string
    18→  readonly suffixSegment?: string
    19→  // Indicates if there is a static segment after this required/optional param
    20→  readonly hasStaticAfter?: boolean
    21→}
    22→
    23→export function joinPaths(paths: Array<string | undefined>) {
    24→  return cleanPath(
    25→    paths
    26→      .filter((val) => {
    27→        return val !== undefined
    28→      })
    29→      .join('/'),
    30→  )
    31→}
    32→
    33→export function cleanPath(path: string) {
    34→  // remove double slashes
    35→  return path.replace(/\/{2,}/g, '/')
    36→}
    37→
    38→export function trimPathLeft(path: string) {
    39→  return path === '/' ? path : path.replace(/^\/{1,}/, '')
    40→}
    41→
    42→export function trimPathRight(path: string) {
    43→  return path === '/' ? path : path.replace(/\/{1,}$/, '')
    44→}
    45→
    46→export function trimPath(path: string) {
    47→  return trimPathRight(trimPathLeft(path))
    48→}
    49→
    50→export function removeTrailingSlash(value: string, basepath: string): string {
    51→  if (value?.endsWith('/') && value !== '/' && value !== `${basepath}/`) {
    52→    return value.slice(0, -1)
    53→  }
    54→  return value
    55→}
    56→
    57→// intended to only compare path name
    58→// see the usage in the isActive under useLinkProps
    59→// /sample/path1 = /sample/path1/
    60→// /sample/path1/some <> /sample/path1
    61→export function exactPathTest(
    62→  pathName1: string,
    63→  pathName2: string,
    64→  basepath: string,
    65→): boolean {
    66→  return (
    67→    removeTrailingSlash(pathName1, basepath) ===
    68→    removeTrailingSlash(pathName2, basepath)
    69→  )
    70→}
    71→
    72→// When resolving relative paths, we treat all paths as if they are trailing slash
    73→// documents. All trailing slashes are removed after the path is resolved.
    74→// Here are a few examples:
    75→//
    76→// /a/b/c + ./d = /a/b/c/d
    77→// /a/b/c + ../d = /a/b/d
    78→// /a/b/c + ./d/ = /a/b/c/d
    79→// /a/b/c + ../d/ = /a/b/d
    80→// /a/b/c + ./ = /a/b/c
    81→//
    82→// Absolute paths that start with `/` short circuit the resolution process to the root
    83→// path.
    84→//
    85→// Here are some examples:
    86→//
    87→// /a/b/c + /d = /d
    88→// /a/b/c + /d/ = /d
    89→// /a/b/c + / = /
    90→//
    91→// Non-.-prefixed paths are still treated as relative paths, resolved like `./`
    92→//
    93→// Here are some examples:
    94→//
    95→// /a/b/c + d = /a/b/c/d
    96→// /a/b/c + d/ = /a/b/c/d
    97→// /a/b/c + d/e = /a/b/c/d/e
    98→interface ResolvePathOptions {
    99→  basepath: string
   100→  base: string
   101→  to: string
   102→  trailingSlash?: 'always' | 'never' | 'preserve'
   103→  caseSensitive?: boolean
   104→}
   105→
   106→function segmentToString(segment: Segment): string {
   107→  const { type, value } = segment
   108→  if (type === SEGMENT_TYPE_PATHNAME) {
   109→    return value
   110→  }
   111→
   112→  const { prefixSegment, suffixSegment } = segment
   113→
   114→  if (type === SEGMENT_TYPE_PARAM) {
   115→    const param = value.substring(1)
   116→    if (prefixSegment && suffixSegment) {
   117→      return `${prefixSegment}{$${param}}${suffixSegment}`
   118→    } else if (prefixSegment) {
   119→      return `${prefixSegment}{$${param}}`
   120→    } else if (suffixSegment) {
   121→      return `{$${param}}${suffixSegment}`
   122→    }
   123→  }
   124→
   125→  if (type === SEGMENT_TYPE_OPTIONAL_PARAM) {
   126→    const param = value.substring(1)
   127→    if (prefixSegment && suffixSegment) {
   128→      return `${prefixSegment}{-$${param}}${suffixSegment}`
   129→    } else if (prefixSegment) {
   130→      return `${prefixSegment}{-$${param}}`
   131→    } else if (suffixSegment) {
   132→      return `{-$${param}}${suffixSegment}`
   133→    }
   134→    return `{-$${param}}`
   135→  }
   136→
   137→  if (type === SEGMENT_TYPE_WILDCARD) {
   138→    if (prefixSegment && suffixSegment) {
   139→      return `${prefixSegment}{$}${suffixSegment}`
   140→    } else if (prefixSegment) {
   141→      return `${prefixSegment}{$}`
   142→    } else if (suffixSegment) {
   143→      return `{$}${suffixSegment}`
   144→    }
   145→  }
   146→
   147→  // This case should never happen, should we throw instead?
   148→  return value
   149→}
   150→
   151→export function resolvePath({
   152→  basepath,
   153→  base,
   154→  to,
   155→  trailingSlash = 'never',
   156→  caseSensitive,
   157→}: ResolvePathOptions) {
   158→  base = removeBasepath(basepath, base, caseSensitive)
   159→  to = removeBasepath(basepath, to, caseSensitive)
   160→
   161→  let baseSegments = parsePathname(base).slice()
   162→  const toSegments = parsePathname(to)
   163→
   164→  if (baseSegments.length > 1 && last(baseSegments)?.value === '/') {
   165→    baseSegments.pop()
   166→  }
   167→
   168→  for (let index = 0, length = toSegments.length; index < length; index++) {
   169→    const toSegment = toSegments[index]!
   170→    const value = toSegment.value
   171→    if (value === '/') {
   172→      if (!index) {
   173→        // Leading slash
   174→        baseSegments = [toSegment]
   175→      } else if (index === length - 1) {
   176→        // Trailing Slash
   177→        baseSegments.push(toSegment)
   178→      } else {
   179→        // ignore inter-slashes
   180→      }
   181→    } else if (value === '..') {
   182→      baseSegments.pop()
   183→    } else if (value === '.') {
   184→      // ignore
   185→    } else {
   186→      baseSegments.push(toSegment)
   187→    }
   188→  }
   189→
   190→  if (baseSegments.length > 1) {
   191→    if (last(baseSegments)!.value === '/') {
   192→      if (trailingSlash === 'never') {
   193→        baseSegments.pop()
   194→      }
   195→    } else if (trailingSlash === 'always') {
   196→      baseSegments.push({ type: SEGMENT_TYPE_PATHNAME, value: '/' })
   197→    }
   198→  }
   199→
   200→  const segmentValues = baseSegments.map(segmentToString)
   201→  const joined = joinPaths([basepath, ...segmentValues])
   202→  return joined
   203→}
   204→
   205→const PARAM_RE = /^\$.{1,}$/ // $paramName
   206→const PARAM_W_CURLY_BRACES_RE = /^(.*?)\{(\$[a-zA-Z_$][a-zA-Z0-9_$]*)\}(.*)$/ // prefix{$paramName}suffix
   207→const OPTIONAL_PARAM_W_CURLY_BRACES_RE =
   208→  /^(.*?)\{-(\$[a-zA-Z_$][a-zA-Z0-9_$]*)\}(.*)$/ // prefix{-$paramName}suffix
   209→
   210→const WILDCARD_RE = /^\$$/ // $
   211→const WILDCARD_W_CURLY_BRACES_RE = /^(.*?)\{\$\}(.*)$/ // prefix{$}suffix
   212→
   213→/**
   214→ * Required: `/foo/$bar` ✅
   215→ * Prefix and Suffix: `/foo/prefix${bar}suffix` ✅
   216→ * Wildcard: `/foo/$` ✅
   217→ * Wildcard with Prefix and Suffix: `/foo/prefix{$}suffix` ✅
   218→ *
   219→ * Optional param: `/foo/{-$bar}`
   220→ * Optional param with Prefix and Suffix: `/foo/prefix{-$bar}suffix`
   221→
   222→ * Future:
   223→ * Optional named segment: `/foo/{bar}`
   224→ * Optional named segment with Prefix and Suffix: `/foo/prefix{-bar}suffix`
   225→ * Escape special characters:
   226→ * - `/foo/[$]` - Static route
   227→ * - `/foo/[$]{$foo} - Dynamic route with a static prefix of `$`
   228→ * - `/foo/{$foo}[$]` - Dynamic route with a static suffix of `$`
   229→ */
   230→export function parsePathname(pathname?: string): ReadonlyArray<Segment> {
   231→  if (!pathname) {
   232→    return []
   233→  }
   234→
   235→  pathname = cleanPath(pathname)
   236→
   237→  const segments: Array<Segment> = []
   238→
   239→  if (pathname.slice(0, 1) === '/') {
   240→    pathname = pathname.substring(1)
   241→    segments.push({
   242→      type: SEGMENT_TYPE_PATHNAME,
   243→      value: '/',
   244→    })
   245→  }
   246→
   247→  if (!pathname) {
   248→    return segments
   249→  }
   250→
   251→  // Remove empty segments and '.' segments
   252→  const split = pathname.split('/').filter(Boolean)
   253→
   254→  segments.push(
   255→    ...split.map((part): Segment => {
   256→      // Check for wildcard with curly braces: prefix{$}suffix
   257→      const wildcardBracesMatch = part.match(WILDCARD_W_CURLY_BRACES_RE)
   258→      if (wildcardBracesMatch) {
   259→        const prefix = wildcardBracesMatch[1]
   260→        const suffix = wildcardBracesMatch[2]
   261→        return {
   262→          type: SEGMENT_TYPE_WILDCARD,
   263→          value: '$',
   264→          prefixSegment: prefix || undefined,
   265→          suffixSegment: suffix || undefined,
   266→        }
   267→      }
   268→
   269→      // Check for optional parameter format: prefix{-$paramName}suffix
   270→      const optionalParamBracesMatch = part.match(
   271→        OPTIONAL_PARAM_W_CURLY_BRACES_RE,
   272→      )
   273→      if (optionalParamBracesMatch) {
   274→        const prefix = optionalParamBracesMatch[1]
   275→        const paramName = optionalParamBracesMatch[2]!
   276→        const suffix = optionalParamBracesMatch[3]
   277→        return {
   278→          type: SEGMENT_TYPE_OPTIONAL_PARAM,
   279→          value: paramName, // Now just $paramName (no prefix)
   280→          prefixSegment: prefix || undefined,
   281→          suffixSegment: suffix || undefined,
   282→        }
   283→      }
   284→
   285→      // Check for the new parameter format: prefix{$paramName}suffix
   286→      const paramBracesMatch = part.match(PARAM_W_CURLY_BRACES_RE)
   287→      if (paramBracesMatch) {
   288→        const prefix = paramBracesMatch[1]
   289→        const paramName = paramBracesMatch[2]
   290→        const suffix = paramBracesMatch[3]
   291→        return {
   292→          type: SEGMENT_TYPE_PARAM,
   293→          value: '' + paramName,
   294→          prefixSegment: prefix || undefined,
   295→          suffixSegment: suffix || undefined,
   296→        }
   297→      }
   298→
   299→      // Check for bare parameter format: $paramName (without curly braces)
   300→      if (PARAM_RE.test(part)) {
   301→        const paramName = part.substring(1)
   302→        return {
   303→          type: SEGMENT_TYPE_PARAM,
   304→          value: '$' + paramName,
   305→          prefixSegment: undefined,
   306→          suffixSegment: undefined,
   307→        }
   308→      }
   309→
   310→      // Check for bare wildcard: $ (without curly braces)
   311→      if (WILDCARD_RE.test(part)) {
   312→        return {
   313→          type: SEGMENT_TYPE_WILDCARD,
   314→          value: '$',
   315→          prefixSegment: undefined,
   316→          suffixSegment: undefined,
   317→        }
   318→      }
   319→
   320→      // Handle regular pathname segment
   321→      return {
   322→        type: SEGMENT_TYPE_PATHNAME,
   323→        value: part.includes('%25')
   324→          ? part
   325→              .split('%25')
   326→              .map((segment) => decodeURI(segment))
   327→              .join('%25')
   328→          : decodeURI(part),
   329→      }
   330→    }),
   331→  )
   332→
   333→  if (pathname.slice(-1) === '/') {
   334→    pathname = pathname.substring(1)
   335→    segments.push({
   336→      type: SEGMENT_TYPE_PATHNAME,
   337→      value: '/',
   338→    })
   339→  }
   340→
   341→  return segments
   342→}
   343→
   344→interface InterpolatePathOptions {
   345→  path?: string
   346→  params: Record<string, unknown>
   347→  leaveWildcards?: boolean
   348→  leaveParams?: boolean
   349→  // Map of encoded chars to decoded chars (e.g. '%40' -> '@') that should remain decoded in path params
   350→  decodeCharMap?: Map<string, string>
   351→}
   352→
   353→type InterPolatePathResult = {
   354→  interpolatedPath: string
   355→  usedParams: Record<string, unknown>
   356→  isMissingParams: boolean // true if any params were not available when being looked up in the params object
   357→}
   358→export function interpolatePath({
   359→  path,
   360→  params,
   361→  leaveWildcards,
   362→  leaveParams,
   363→  decodeCharMap,
   364→}: InterpolatePathOptions): InterPolatePathResult {
   365→  const interpolatedPathSegments = parsePathname(path)
   366→
   367→  function encodeParam(key: string): any {
   368→    const value = params[key]
   369→    const isValueString = typeof value === 'string'
   370→
   371→    if (key === '*' || key === '_splat') {
   372→      // the splat/catch-all routes shouldn't have the '/' encoded out
   373→      return isValueString ? encodeURI(value) : value
   374→    } else {
   375→      return isValueString ? encodePathParam(value, decodeCharMap) : value
   376→    }
   377→  }
   378→
   379→  // Tracking if any params are missing in the `params` object
   380→  // when interpolating the path
   381→  let isMissingParams = false
   382→
   383→  const usedParams: Record<string, unknown> = {}
   384→  const interpolatedPath = joinPaths(
   385→    interpolatedPathSegments.map((segment) => {
   386→      if (segment.type === SEGMENT_TYPE_PATHNAME) {
   387→        return segment.value
   388→      }
   389→
   390→      if (segment.type === SEGMENT_TYPE_WILDCARD) {
   391→        usedParams._splat = params._splat
   392→        const segmentPrefix = segment.prefixSegment || ''
   393→        const segmentSuffix = segment.suffixSegment || ''
   394→
   395→        // Check if _splat parameter is missing
   396→        if (!('_splat' in params)) {
   397→          isMissingParams = true
   398→          // For missing splat parameters, just return the prefix and suffix without the wildcard
   399→          if (leaveWildcards) {
   400→            return `${segmentPrefix}${segment.value}${segmentSuffix}`
   401→          }
   402→          // If there is a prefix or suffix, return them joined, otherwise omit the segment
   403→          if (segmentPrefix || segmentSuffix) {
   404→            return `${segmentPrefix}${segmentSuffix}`
   405→          }
   406→          return undefined
   407→        }
   408→
   409→        const value = encodeParam('_splat')
   410→        if (leaveWildcards) {
   411→          return `${segmentPrefix}${segment.value}${value ?? ''}${segmentSuffix}`
   412→        }
   413→        return `${segmentPrefix}${value}${segmentSuffix}`
   414→      }
   415→
   416→      if (segment.type === SEGMENT_TYPE_PARAM) {
   417→        const key = segment.value.substring(1)
   418→        if (!isMissingParams && !(key in params)) {
   419→          isMissingParams = true
   420→        }
   421→        usedParams[key] = params[key]
   422→
   423→        const segmentPrefix = segment.prefixSegment || ''
   424→        const segmentSuffix = segment.suffixSegment || ''
   425→        if (leaveParams) {
   426→          const value = encodeParam(segment.value)
   427→          return `${segmentPrefix}${segment.value}${value ?? ''}${segmentSuffix}`
   428→        }
   429→        return `${segmentPrefix}${encodeParam(key) ?? 'undefined'}${segmentSuffix}`
   430→      }
   431→
   432→      if (segment.type === SEGMENT_TYPE_OPTIONAL_PARAM) {
   433→        const key = segment.value.substring(1)
   434→
   435→        const segmentPrefix = segment.prefixSegment || ''
   436→        const segmentSuffix = segment.suffixSegment || ''
   437→
   438→        // Check if optional parameter is missing or undefined
   439→        if (!(key in params) || params[key] == null) {
   440→          if (leaveWildcards) {
   441→            return `${segmentPrefix}${key}${segmentSuffix}`
   442→          }
   443→          // For optional params with prefix/suffix, keep the prefix/suffix but omit the param
   444→          if (segmentPrefix || segmentSuffix) {
   445→            return `${segmentPrefix}${segmentSuffix}`
   446→          }
   447→          // If no prefix/suffix, omit the entire segment
   448→          return undefined
   449→        }
   450→
   451→        usedParams[key] = params[key]
   452→
   453→        if (leaveParams) {
   454→          const value = encodeParam(segment.value)
   455→          return `${segmentPrefix}${segment.value}${value ?? ''}${segmentSuffix}`
   456→        }
   457→        return `${segmentPrefix}${encodeParam(key) ?? ''}${segmentSuffix}`
   458→      }
   459→
   460→      return segment.value
   461→    }),
   462→  )
   463→  return { usedParams, interpolatedPath, isMissingParams }
   464→}
   465→
   466→function encodePathParam(value: string, decodeCharMap?: Map<string, string>) {
   467→  let encoded = encodeURIComponent(value)
   468→  if (decodeCharMap) {
   469→    for (const [encodedChar, char] of decodeCharMap) {
   470→      encoded = encoded.replaceAll(encodedChar, char)
   471→    }
   472→  }
   473→  return encoded
   474→}
   475→
   476→export function matchPathname(
   477→  basepath: string,
   478→  currentPathname: string,
   479→  matchLocation: Pick<MatchLocation, 'to' | 'fuzzy' | 'caseSensitive'>,
   480→): AnyPathParams | undefined {
   481→  const pathParams = matchByPath(basepath, currentPathname, matchLocation)
   482→  // const searchMatched = matchBySearch(location.search, matchLocation)
   483→
   484→  if (matchLocation.to && !pathParams) {
   485→    return
   486→  }
   487→
   488→  return pathParams ?? {}
   489→}
   490→
   491→export function removeBasepath(
   492→  basepath: string,
   493→  pathname: string,
   494→  caseSensitive: boolean = false,
   495→) {
   496→  // normalize basepath and pathname for case-insensitive comparison if needed
   497→  const normalizedBasepath = caseSensitive ? basepath : basepath.toLowerCase()
   498→  const normalizedPathname = caseSensitive ? pathname : pathname.toLowerCase()
   499→
   500→  switch (true) {
   501→    // default behaviour is to serve app from the root - pathname
   502→    // left untouched
   503→    case normalizedBasepath === '/':
   504→      return pathname
   505→
   506→    // shortcut for removing the basepath if it matches the pathname
   507→    case normalizedPathname === normalizedBasepath:
   508→      return ''
   509→
   510→    // in case pathname is shorter than basepath - there is
   511→    // nothing to remove
   512→    case pathname.length < basepath.length:
   513→      return pathname
   514→
   515→    // avoid matching partial segments - strict equality handled
   516→    // earlier, otherwise, basepath separated from pathname with
   517→    // separator, therefore lack of separator means partial
   518→    // segment match (`/app` should not match `/application`)
   519→    case normalizedPathname[normalizedBasepath.length] !== '/':
   520→      return pathname
   521→
   522→    // remove the basepath from the pathname if it starts with it
   523→    case normalizedPathname.startsWith(normalizedBasepath):
   524→      return pathname.slice(basepath.length)
   525→
   526→    // otherwise, return the pathname as is
   527→    default:
   528→      return pathname
   529→  }
   530→}
   531→
   532→export function matchByPath(
   533→  basepath: string,
   534→  from: string,
   535→  {
   536→    to,
   537→    fuzzy,
   538→    caseSensitive,
   539→  }: Pick<MatchLocation, 'to' | 'caseSensitive' | 'fuzzy'>,
   540→): Record<string, string> | undefined {
   541→  // check basepath first
   542→  if (basepath !== '/' && !from.startsWith(basepath)) {
   543→    return undefined
   544→  }
   545→  // Remove the base path from the pathname
   546→  from = removeBasepath(basepath, from, caseSensitive)
   547→  // Default to to $ (wildcard)
   548→  to = removeBasepath(basepath, `${to ?? '$'}`, caseSensitive)
   549→
   550→  // Parse the from and to
   551→  const baseSegments = parsePathname(from.startsWith('/') ? from : `/${from}`)
   552→  const routeSegments = parsePathname(to.startsWith('/') ? to : `/${to}`)
   553→
   554→  const params: Record<string, string> = {}
   555→
   556→  const result = isMatch(
   557→    baseSegments,
   558→    routeSegments,
   559→    params,
   560→    fuzzy,
   561→    caseSensitive,
   562→  )
   563→
   564→  return result ? params : undefined
   565→}
   566→
   567→function isMatch(
   568→  baseSegments: ReadonlyArray<Segment>,
   569→  routeSegments: ReadonlyArray<Segment>,
   570→  params: Record<string, string>,
   571→  fuzzy?: boolean,
   572→  caseSensitive?: boolean,
   573→): boolean {
   574→  let baseIndex = 0
   575→  let routeIndex = 0
   576→
   577→  while (baseIndex < baseSegments.length || routeIndex < routeSegments.length) {
   578→    const baseSegment = baseSegments[baseIndex]
   579→    const routeSegment = routeSegments[routeIndex]
   580→
   581→    if (routeSegment) {
   582→      if (routeSegment.type === SEGMENT_TYPE_WILDCARD) {
   583→        // Capture all remaining segments for a wildcard
   584→        const remainingBaseSegments = baseSegments.slice(baseIndex)
   585→
   586→        let _splat: string
   587→
   588→        // If this is a wildcard with prefix/suffix, we need to handle the first segment specially
   589→        if (routeSegment.prefixSegment || routeSegment.suffixSegment) {
   590→          if (!baseSegment) return false
   591→
   592→          const prefix = routeSegment.prefixSegment || ''
   593→          const suffix = routeSegment.suffixSegment || ''
   594→
   595→          // Check if the base segment starts with prefix and ends with suffix
   596→          const baseValue = baseSegment.value
   597→          if ('prefixSegment' in routeSegment) {
   598→            if (!baseValue.startsWith(prefix)) {
   599→              return false
   600→            }
   601→          }
   602→          if ('suffixSegment' in routeSegment) {
   603→            if (
   604→              !baseSegments[baseSegments.length - 1]?.value.endsWith(suffix)
   605→            ) {
   606→              return false
   607→            }
   608→          }
   609→
   610→          let rejoinedSplat = decodeURI(
   611→            joinPaths(remainingBaseSegments.map((d) => d.value)),
   612→          )
   613→
   614→          // Remove the prefix and suffix from the rejoined splat
   615→          if (prefix && rejoinedSplat.startsWith(prefix)) {
   616→            rejoinedSplat = rejoinedSplat.slice(prefix.length)
   617→          }
   618→
   619→          if (suffix && rejoinedSplat.endsWith(suffix)) {
   620→            rejoinedSplat = rejoinedSplat.slice(
   621→              0,
   622→              rejoinedSplat.length - suffix.length,
   623→            )
   624→          }
   625→
   626→          _splat = rejoinedSplat
   627→        } else {
   628→          // If no prefix/suffix, just rejoin the remaining segments

   655→          }

   657→          routeIndex++

   659→        } else {

   661→        }
   662→      }
   663→

   667→        }
   668→

   671→        }
   672→
   673→        let _paramValue = ''
   674→        let matched = false
   675→
   676→        // If this param has prefix/suffix, we need to extract the actual parameter value
   677→        if (routeSegment.prefixSegment || routeSegment.suffixSegment) {
   678→          const prefix = routeSegment.prefixSegment || ''
   679→          const suffix = routeSegment.suffixSegment || ''
   680→
   681→          // Check if the base segment starts with prefix and ends with suffix
   682→          const baseValue = baseSegment.value
   683→          if (prefix && !baseValue.startsWith(prefix)) {

   685→          }
   686→          if (suffix && !baseValue.endsWith(suffix)) {
   687→            return false
   688→          }
   689→
   690→          let paramValue = baseValue
   691→          if (prefix && paramValue.startsWith(prefix)) {
   692→            paramValue = paramValue.slice(prefix.length)
   693→          }
   694→          if (suffix && paramValue.endsWith(suffix)) {
   695→            paramValue = paramValue.slice(0, paramValue.length - suffix.length)
   696→          }

   698→          _paramValue = decodeURIComponent(paramValue)
   699→          matched = true
   700→        } else {

   702→          _paramValue = decodeURIComponent(baseSegment.value)

   727→        }
   728→
   729→        let _paramValue = ''

   735→          const suffix = routeSegment.suffixSegment || ''

   741→            (!suffix || baseValue.endsWith(suffix))

   744→            if (prefix && paramValue.startsWith(prefix)) {
   745→              paramValue = paramValue.slice(prefix.length)

   748→              paramValue = paramValue.slice(
   749→                0,
   750→                paramValue.length - suffix.length,

   781→              futureRouteSegment?.type === SEGMENT_TYPE_PARAM ||

   785→            }

   792→          }

   814→    if (routeIndex < routeSegments.length && baseIndex >= baseSegments.length) {

   822→      break
   823→    }

   825→    break
   826→  }
   827→
   828→  return true

   979→    const history =

   981→
   982→    const rootRoute = createRootRoute({})

   987→

   994→    const articlesRoute = createRoute({
   995→      getParentRoute: () => rootRoute,
   996→      path: '/articles/{-$category}',
   997→    })
   998→
   999→    // Route with nested optional params
  1000→    const docsRoute = createRoute({

  1004→
  1005→    const docsTopicRoute = createRoute({

  1008→    })
  1009→
  1010→    const routeTree = rootRoute.addChildren([
  1011→      indexRoute,
  1012→      postsRoute,
  1013      articlesRoute,

  1016→    const router = createRouter({ routeTree, history })

  1104→describe('router.navigate navigation using optional path parameters - edge cases and validations', () => {
  1105→  function createEdgeCaseTestRouter(initialHistory?: RouterHistory) {
  1106→    const history =
  1107→      initialHistory ?? createMemoryHistory({ initialEntries: ['/'] })
  1108→
  1109→    const rootRoute = createRootRoute({})
  1110→    const indexRoute = createRoute({
  1111→      getParentRoute: () => rootRoute,
  1112→      path: '/',
  1113→    })
  1114→
  1115→    // Route with prefix/suffix
  1116→    const filesRoute = createRoute({
  1117→      getParentRoute: () => rootRoute,
  1118→      path: '/files/prefix{-$name}.txt',
  1119→    })
  1120→
  1121→    // Route with all optional params
  1122→    const dateRoute = createRoute({
  1123→      getParentRoute: () => rootRoute,
  1124→      path: '/date/{-$year}/{-$month}/{-$day}',
  1125→    })
  1126→
  1127→    const routeTree = rootRoute.addChildren([indexRoute, filesRoute, dateRoute])
  1128→    const router = createRouter({ routeTree, history })
  1129→
  1130→    return { router }
  1131→  }
  1132→
  1133→  it('should handle optional parameters with prefix/suffix correctly', async () => {
  1134→    const { router } = createEdgeCaseTestRouter(

  1136→    )
  1137→
  1138→    await router.load()
  1139→    expect(router.state.location.pathname).toBe('/files/prefixdocument.txt')
  1140→
  1141→    // Remove the name parameter

  1143→      to: '/files/prefix{-$name}.txt',
  1144→      params: { name: undefined },
  1145→    })
  1146→    await router.invalidate()
  1147→
  1148→    expect(router.state.location.pathname).toBe('/files/prefix.txt')
  1149→
  1150→    // Add the name parameter back

  1152→      to: '/files/prefix{-$name}.txt',
  1153→      params: { name: 'report' },
  1154→    })
  1155→    await router.invalidate()
  1156→
  1157→    expect(router.state.location.pathname).toBe('/files/prefixreport.txt')
  1158→  })
  1159→
  1160→  it('should handle route with all optional parameters', async () => {
  1161→    const { router } = createEdgeCaseTestRouter(
  1162→      createMemoryHistory({ initialEntries: ['/date/2024/03/15'] }),
  1163→    )
  1164→
  1165→    await router.load()
  1166→    expect(router.state.location.pathname).toBe('/date/2024/03/15')
  1167→
  1168→    // Remove day only
  1169→    await router.navigate({
  1170→      to: '/date/{-$year}/{-$month}/{-$day}',
  1171→      params: { year: '2024', month: '03', day: undefined },
  1172→    })
  1173→    await router.invalidate()
  1174→
  1175→    expect(router.state.location.pathname).toBe('/date/2024/03')
  1176→
  1177→    // Remove month and day
  1178→    await router.navigate({
  1179→      to: '/date/{-$year}/{-$month}/{-$day}',
  1180→      params: { year: '2024', month: undefined, day: undefined },
  1181→    })
  1182→    await router.invalidate()
  1183→
  1184→    expect(router.state.location.pathname).toBe('/date/2024')
  1185→
  1186→    // Remove all parameters
  1187→    await router.navigate({
  1188→      to: '/date/{-$year}/{-$month}/{-$day}',
  1189→      params: { year: undefined, month: undefined, day: undefined },
  1190→    })
  1191→    await router.invalidate()
  1192→
  1193→    expect(router.state.location.pathname).toBe('/date')
  1194→
  1195→    // Add all parameters back
  1196→    await router.navigate({
  1197→      to: '/date/{-$year}/{-$month}/{-$day}',
  1198→      params: { year: '2025', month: '12', day: '31' },
  1199→    })
  1200→    await router.invalidate()
  1201→
  1202→    expect(router.state.location.pathname).toBe('/date/2025/12/31')
  1203→  })
  1204→
  1205→  it('should handle empty string vs undefined distinction', async () => {
  1206→    const { router } = createEdgeCaseTestRouter(

  1229→    expect(router.state.location.pathname).toBe('/files/prefixtest.txt')

   299→   * Route masking is when you display a route at a different path than the one it is configured to match, like a modal popup that when shared will unmask to the modal's content instead of the modal's context.
   300→   *
   301→   * @link [API Docs](https://tanstack.com/router/latest/docs/framework/react/api/router/RouterOptionsType#routemasks-property)
   302→   * @link [Guide](https://tanstack.com/router/latest/docs/framework/react/guide/route-masking)
   303→   */
   304→  routeMasks?: Array<RouteMask<TRouteTree>>
   305→  /**
   306→   * If `true`, route masks will, by default, be removed when the page is reloaded.
   307→   *
   308→   * This can be overridden on a per-mask basis by setting the `unmaskOnReload` option on the mask, or on a per-navigation basis by setting the `unmaskOnReload` option in the `Navigate` options.
   309→   *
   310→   * @default false
   311→   * @link [API Docs](https://tanstack.com/router/latest/docs/framework/react/api/router/RouterOptionsType#unmaskonreload-property)
   312→   * @link [Guide](https://tanstack.com/router/latest/docs/framework/react/guide/route-masking#unmasking-on-page-reload)
   313→   */
   314→  unmaskOnReload?: boolean
   315→
   316→  /**
   317→   * Use `notFoundComponent` instead.
   318→   *
   319→   * @deprecated
   320→   * See https://tanstack.com/router/v1/docs/guide/not-found-errors#migrating-from-notfoundroute for more info.
   321→   * @link [API Docs](https://tanstack.com/router/latest/docs/framework/react/api/router/RouterOptionsType#notfoundroute-property)
   322→   */
   323→  notFoundRoute?: AnyRoute
   324→  /**
   325→   * Configures how trailing slashes are treated.
   326→   *
   327→   * - `'always'` will add a trailing slash if not present
   328→   * - `'never'` will remove the trailing slash if present
   329→   * - `'preserve'` will not modify the trailing slash.
   330→   *
   331→   * @default 'never'
   332→   * @link [API Docs](https://tanstack.com/router/latest/docs/framework/react/api/router/RouterOptionsType#trailingslash-property)
   333→   */
   334→  trailingSlash?: TTrailingSlashOption
   335→  /**
   336→   * While usually automatic, sometimes it can be useful to force the router into a server-side state, e.g. when using the router in a non-browser environment that has access to a global.document object.
   337→   *
   338→   * @default typeof document !== 'undefined'
   339→   * @link [API Docs](https://tanstack.com/router/latest/docs/framework/react/api/router/RouterOptionsType#isserver-property)
   340→   */
   341→  isServer?: boolean
   342→
   343→  /**
   344→   * @default false
   345→   */
   346→  isShell?: boolean
   347→
   348→  /**
   349→   * The default `ssr` a route should use if no `ssr` is provided.
   350→   *
   351→   * @default true
   352→   */
   353→  defaultSsr?: boolean | 'data-only'
   354→
   355→  search?: {
   356→    /**
   357→     * Configures how unknown search params (= not returned by any `validateSearch`) are treated.
   358→     *
   359→     * @default false
   360→     * @link [API Docs](https://tanstack.com/router/latest/docs/framework/react/api/router/RouterOptionsType#search.strict-property)
   361→     */
   362→    strict?: boolean
   363→  }
   364→
   365→  /**
   366→   * Configures whether structural sharing is enabled by default for fine-grained selectors.
   367→   *
   368→   * @link [API Docs](https://tanstack.com/router/latest/docs/framework/react/api/router/RouterOptionsType#defaultstructuralsharing-property)
   369→   */
   370→  defaultStructuralSharing?: TDefaultStructuralSharingOption
   371→
   372→  /**
   373→   * Configures which URI characters are allowed in path params that would ordinarily be escaped by encodeURIComponent.
   374→   *
   375→   * @link [API Docs](https://tanstack.com/router/latest/docs/framework/react/api/router/RouterOptionsType#pathparamsallowedcharacters-property)
   376→   * @link [Guide](https://tanstack.com/router/latest/docs/framework/react/guide/path-params#allowed-characters)
   377→   */
   378→  pathParamsAllowedCharacters?: Array<
   379→    ';' | ':' | '@' | '&' | '=' | '+' | '$' | ','
   380→  >
   381→
   382→  defaultRemountDeps?: DefaultRemountDepsFn<TRouteTree>
   383→
   384→  /**
   385→   * If `true`, scroll restoration will be enabled
   386→   *
   387→   * @default false
   388→   */
   389→  scrollRestoration?: boolean
   390→
   391→  /**
   392→   * A function that will be called to get the key for the scroll restoration cache.
   393→   *
   394→   * @default (location) => location.href
   395→   */
   396→  getScrollRestorationKey?: (location: ParsedLocation) => string
   397→  /**
   398→   * The default behavior for scroll restoration.
   399→   *
   400→   * @default 'auto'
   401→   */
   402→  scrollRestorationBehavior?: ScrollBehavior
   403→  /**
   404→   * An array of selectors that will be used to scroll to the top of the page in addition to `window`
   405→   *
   406→   * @default ['window']
   407→   */
   408→  scrollToTopSelectors?: Array<string | (() => Element | null | undefined)>
   409→}

   669→export type AnyRouterWithContext<TContext> = RouterCore<

   677→export type AnyRouter = RouterCore<any, any, any, any, any>
   678→
   679→export interface ViewTransitionOptions {
   680→  types:
   681→    | Array<string>
   682→    | ((locationChangeInfo: {
   683→        fromLocation?: ParsedLocation
   684→        toLocation: ParsedLocation
   685→        pathChanged: boolean
   686→        hrefChanged: boolean
   687→        hashChanged: boolean
   688→      }) => Array<string>)

   690→
   691→export function defaultSerializeError(err: unknown) {
   692→  if (err instanceof Error) {
   693→    const obj = {
   694→      name: err.name,
   695→      message: err.message,
   696→    }
   697→
   698→    if (process.env.NODE_ENV === 'development') {
   699→      ;(obj as any).stack = err.stack
   700→    }
   701→
   702→    return obj
   703→  }
   704→
   705→  return {
   706→    data: err,
   707→  }
   708→}
   709→
   710→export type TrailingSlashOption = 'always' | 'never' | 'preserve'
   711→
   712→export function getLocationChangeInfo(routerState: {
   713→  resolvedLocation?: ParsedLocation
   714→  location: ParsedLocation
   715→}) {
   716→  const fromLocation = routerState.resolvedLocation
   717→  const toLocation = routerState.location
   718→  const pathChanged = fromLocation?.pathname !== toLocation.pathname
   719→  const hrefChanged = fromLocation?.href !== toLocation.href
   720→  const hashChanged = fromLocation?.hash !== toLocation.hash
   721→  return { fromLocation, toLocation, pathChanged, hrefChanged, hashChanged }
   722→}
   723→
   724→export type CreateRouterFn = <
   725→  TRouteTree extends AnyRoute,
   726→  TTrailingSlashOption extends TrailingSlashOption = 'never',
   727→  TDefaultStructuralSharingOption extends boolean = false,
   728→  TRouterHistory extends RouterHistory = RouterHistory,
   729→  TDehydrated extends Record<string, any> = Record<string, any>,
   730→>(
   731→  options: undefined extends number
   732→    ? 'strictNullChecks must be enabled in tsconfig.json'
   733→    : RouterConstructorOptions<
   734→        TRouteTree,
   735→        TTrailingSlashOption,
   736→        TDefaultStructuralSharingOption,
   737→        TRouterHistory,
   738→        TDehydrated
   739→      >,
   740→) => RouterCore<
   741→  TRouteTree,
   742→  TTrailingSlashOption,
   743→  TDefaultStructuralSharingOption,
   744→  TRouterHistory,
   745→  TDehydrated
   746→>
   747→
   748→export class RouterCore<
   749→  in out TRouteTree extends AnyRoute,
   750→  in out TTrailingSlashOption extends TrailingSlashOption,
   751→  in out TDefaultStructuralSharingOption extends boolean,
   752→  in out TRouterHistory extends RouterHistory = RouterHistory,
   753→  in out TDehydrated extends Record<string, any> = Record<string, any>,
   754→> {
   755→  // Option-independent properties
   756→  tempLocationKey: string | undefined = `${Math.round(
   757→    Math.random() * 10000000,
   758→  )}`
   759→  resetNextScroll = true
   760→  shouldViewTransition?: boolean | ViewTransitionOptions = undefined
   761→  isViewTransitionTypesSupported?: boolean = undefined
   762→  subscribers = new Set<RouterListener<RouterEvent>>()
   763→  viewTransitionPromise?: ControlledPromise<true>
   764→  isScrollRestoring = false
   765→  isScrollRestorationSetup = false
   766→
   767→  // Must build in constructor
   768→  __store!: Store<RouterState<TRouteTree>>
   769→  options!: PickAsRequired<
   770→    RouterOptions<
   771→      TRouteTree,
   772→      TTrailingSlashOption,
   773→      TDefaultStructuralSharingOption,
   774→      TRouterHistory,
   775→      TDehydrated
   776→    >,
   777→    'stringifySearch' | 'parseSearch' | 'context'
   778→  >
   779→  history!: TRouterHistory
   780→  latestLocation!: ParsedLocation<FullSearchSchema<TRouteTree>>
   781→  basepath!: string
   782→  routeTree!: TRouteTree
   783→  routesById!: RoutesById<TRouteTree>
   784→  routesByPath!: RoutesByPath<TRouteTree>
   785→  flatRoutes!: Array<AnyRoute>
   786→  isServer!: boolean
   787→  pathParamsDecodeCharMap?: Map<string, string>
   788→
   789→  /**
   790→   * @deprecated Use the `createRouter` function instead
   791→   */
   792→  constructor(
   793→    options: RouterConstructorOptions<
   794→      TRouteTree,
   795→      TTrailingSlashOption,
   796→      TDefaultStructuralSharingOption,
   797→      TRouterHistory,
   798→      TDehydrated
   799→    >,
   800→  ) {
   801→    this.update({
   802→      defaultPreloadDelay: 50,
   803→      defaultPendingMs: 1000,
   804→      defaultPendingMinMs: 500,
   805→      context: undefined!,
   806→      ...options,
   807→      caseSensitive: options.caseSensitive ?? false,
   808→      notFoundMode: options.notFoundMode ?? 'fuzzy',
   809→      stringifySearch: options.stringifySearch ?? defaultStringifySearch,
   810→      parseSearch: options.parseSearch ?? defaultParseSearch,
   811→    })
   812→
   813→    if (typeof document !== 'undefined') {
   814→      self.__TSR_ROUTER__ = this
   815→    }
   816→  }
   817→
   818→  // These are default implementations that can optionally be overridden
   819→  // by the router provider once rendered. We provide these so that the
   820→  // router can be used in a non-react environment if necessary
   821→  startTransition: StartTransitionFn = (fn) => fn()
   822→
   823→  isShell() {
   824→    return this.options.isShell
   825→  }
   826→
   827→  update: UpdateFn<
   828→    TRouteTree,
   829→    TTrailingSlashOption,
   830→    TDefaultStructuralSharingOption,
   831→    TRouterHistory,
   832→    TDehydrated
   833→  > = (newOptions) => {
   834→    if (newOptions.notFoundRoute) {
   835→      console.warn(
   836→        'The notFoundRoute API is deprecated and will be removed in the next major version. See https://tanstack.com/router/v1/docs/framework/react/guide/not-found-errors#migrating-from-notfoundroute for more info.',
   837→      )
   838→    }
   839→
   840→    const previousOptions = this.options
   841→    this.options = {
   842→      ...this.options,
   843→      ...newOptions,
   844→    }
   845→
   846→    this.isServer = this.options.isServer ?? typeof document === 'undefined'
   847→
   848→    this.pathParamsDecodeCharMap = this.options.pathParamsAllowedCharacters
   849→      ? new Map(
   850→          this.options.pathParamsAllowedCharacters.map((char) => [
   851→            encodeURIComponent(char),
   852→            char,
   853→          ]),
   854→        )
   855→      : undefined
   856→
   857→    if (
   858→      !this.basepath ||
   859→      (newOptions.basepath && newOptions.basepath !== previousOptions.basepath)
   860→    ) {
   861→      if (
   862→        newOptions.basepath === undefined ||
   863→        newOptions.basepath === '' ||
   864→        newOptions.basepath === '/'
   865→      ) {
   866→        this.basepath = '/'
   867→      } else {
   868→        this.basepath = `/${trimPath(newOptions.basepath)}`
   869→      }
   870→    }
   871→
   872→    if (
   873→      !this.history ||
   874→      (this.options.history && this.options.history !== this.history)
   875→    ) {
   876→      this.history =
   877→        this.options.history ??
   878→        ((this.isServer
   879→          ? createMemoryHistory({
   880→              initialEntries: [this.basepath || '/'],
   881→            })
   882→          : createBrowserHistory()) as TRouterHistory)
   883→      this.latestLocation = this.parseLocation()
   884→    }
   885→
   886→    if (this.options.routeTree !== this.routeTree) {
   887→      this.routeTree = this.options.routeTree as TRouteTree
   888→      this.buildRouteTree()
   889→    }
   890→
   891→    if (!this.__store) {
   892→      this.__store = new Store(getInitialRouterState(this.latestLocation), {
   893→        onUpdate: () => {
   894→          this.__store.state = {
   895→            ...this.state,
   896→            cachedMatches: this.state.cachedMatches.filter(
   897→              (d) => !['redirected'].includes(d.status),
   898→            ),
   899→          }
   900→        },
   901→      })
   902→
   903→      setupScrollRestoration(this)
   904→    }
   905→
   906→    if (
   907→      typeof window !== 'undefined' &&
   908→      'CSS' in window &&
   909→      typeof window.CSS?.supports === 'function'
   910→    ) {
   911→      this.isViewTransitionTypesSupported = window.CSS.supports(
   912→        'selector(:active-view-transition-type(a)',
   913→      )
   914→    }
   915→  }
   916→
   917→  get state() {
   918→    return this.__store.state
   919→  }
   920→
   921→  buildRouteTree = () => {
   922→    const { routesById, routesByPath, flatRoutes } = processRouteTree({
   923→      routeTree: this.routeTree,
   924→      initRoute: (route, i) => {
   925→        route.init({
   926→          originalIndex: i,
   927→        })
   928→      },
   929→    })
   930→

  1558→    const buildWithMatches = (
  1559→      dest: BuildNextOptions = {},
  1560→      maskedDest?: BuildNextOptions,
  1561→    ) => {
  1562→      const next = build(dest)
  1563→
  1564→      let maskedNext = maskedDest ? build(maskedDest) : undefined
  1565→
  1566→      if (!maskedNext) {
  1567→        let params = {}
  1568→
  1569→        const foundMask = this.options.routeMasks?.find((d) => {
  1570→          const match = matchPathname(this.basepath, next.pathname, {
  1571→            to: d.from,
  1572→            caseSensitive: false,
  1573→            fuzzy: false,
  1574→          })
  1575→
  1576→          if (match) {
  1577→            params = match
  1578→            return true
  1579→          }
  1580→
  1581→          return false
  1582→        })
  1583→
  1584→        if (foundMask) {
  1585→          const { from: _from, ...maskProps } = foundMask
  1586→          maskedDest = {
  1587→            ...pick(opts, ['from']),
  1588→            ...maskProps,
  1589→            params,
  1590→          }
  1591→          maskedNext = build(maskedDest)
  1592→        }
  1593→      }
  1594→
  1595→      if (maskedNext) {
  1596→        const maskedFinal = build(maskedDest)
  1597→        next.maskedLocation = maskedFinal
  1598→      }
  1599→
  1600→      return next
  1601→    }
  1602→
  1603→    if (opts.mask) {
  1604→      return buildWithMatches(opts, {
  1605→        ...pick(opts, ['from']),
  1606→        ...opts.mask,
  1607→      })
  1608→    }
  1609→
  1610→    return buildWithMatches(opts)

  1613→  commitLocationPromise: undefined | ControlledPromise<void>

  1615→  commitLocation: CommitLocationFn = ({

  1617→    ignoreBlocker,
  1618→    ...next
  1619→  }) => {
  1620→    const isSameState = () => {

  1622→      // temporarily add the previous values to the next state so they don't affect
  1623→      // the comparison
  1624→      const ignoredProps = [
  1625→        'key', // TODO: Remove in v2 - use __TSR_key instead
  1626→        '__TSR_key',
  1627→        '__TSR_index',
  1628→        '__hashScrollIntoViewOptions',
  1629→      ] as const
  1630→      ignoredProps.forEach((prop) => {
  1631→        ;(next.state as any)[prop] = this.latestLocation.state[prop]
  1632→      })
  1633→      const isEqual = deepEqual(next.state, this.latestLocation.state)
  1634→      ignoredProps.forEach((prop) => {
  1635→        delete next.state[prop]
  1636→      })
  1637→      return isEqual

  1643→    this.commitLocationPromise = createControlledPromise<void>(() => {
  1644→      previousCommitPromise?.resolve()

  1652→      let { maskedLocation, hashScrollIntoView, ...nextHistory } = next
  1653→
  1654→      if (maskedLocation) {
  1655→        nextHistory = {
  1656→          ...maskedLocation,
  1657→          state: {
  1658→            ...maskedLocation.state,
  1659→            __tempKey: undefined,
  1660→            __tempLocation: {
  1661→              ...nextHistory,
  1662→              search: nextHistory.searchStr,
  1663→              state: {
  1664→                ...nextHistory.state,
  1665→                __tempKey: undefined!,
  1666→                __tempLocation: undefined!,
  1667→                __TSR_key: undefined!,
  1668→                key: undefined!, // TODO: Remove in v2 - use __TSR_key instead
  1669→              },
  1670→            },
  1671→          },
  1672→        }

  1674→        if (
  1675→          nextHistory.unmaskOnReload ??
  1676→          this.options.unmaskOnReload ??
  1677→          false
  1678→        ) {
  1679→          nextHistory.state.__tempKey = this.tempLocationKey
  1680→        }
  1681→      }

  1699→    }

  1701→    return this.commitLocationPromise
  1702→  }

  1704→  buildAndCommitLocation = ({

  1706→    resetScroll,
  1707→    hashScrollIntoView,
  1708→    viewTransition,
  1709→    ignoreBlocker,

  1720→      rest.search = this.options.parseSearch(parsed.search)

  1722→      rest.hash = parsed.hash.slice(1)

  1727→      _includeValidateSearch: true,
  1728→    })

  1731→      ...location,
  1732→      viewTransition,
  1733→      replace,
  1734→      resetScroll,
  1735→      hashScrollIntoView,
  1736→      ignoreBlocker,
  1737→    })

  1763→      href,
  1764→      to: to as string,

  1781→        params: true,

  1793→          return url
  1794→        }
  1795→      }

  1798→        trimPath(normalizeUrl(this.latestLocation.href)) !==

  1809→      ...s,
  1810→      status: 'pending',
  1811→      statusCode: 200,
  1812→      isLoading: true,
  1813→      location: this.latestLocation,
  1814→      pendingMatches,
  1815→      // If a cached moved to pendingMatches, remove it from cachedMatches

  1817→        (d) => !pendingMatches.find((e) => e.id === d.id),

  1819→    }))

  1846→            type: 'onBeforeLoad',

  1866→                let enteringMatches!: Array<AnyRouteMatch>
  1867→                let stayingMatches!: Array<AnyRouteMatch>

  1876→                    )

  1878→                      (match) =>
  1879→                        !previousMatches.find((d) => d.id === match.id),
  1880→                    )

  1882→                      newMatches.find((d) => d.id === match.id),
  1883→                    )

  1887→                      isLoading: false,
  1888→                      loadedAt: Date.now(),
  1889→                      matches: newMatches,
  1890→                      pendingMatches: undefined,
  1891→                      cachedMatches: [

  1893→                        ...exitingMatches.filter((d) => d.status !== 'error'),
  1894→                      ],
  1895→                    }

  1904→                    [enteringMatches, 'onEnter'],
  1905→                    [stayingMatches, 'onStay'],

  1930→            ...s,
  1931→            statusCode: redirect

  1944→          this.latestLoadPromise = undefined

  1946→        }
  1947→        resolve()
  1948→      })
  1949→    })

  1951→    this.latestLoadPromise = loadPromise
  1952→
  1953→    await loadPromise
  1954→
  1955→    while (
  1956→      (this.latestLoadPromise as any) &&

  1965→        statusCode: 404,
  1966→      }))

  2752→  invalidate: InvalidateFn<

  2769→        }

  2844→        route._lazyPromise = route.lazyFn().then((lazyRoute) => {
  2845→          // explicitly don't copy over the lazy route's id
  2846→          const { id: _id, ...options } = lazyRoute.options
  2847→          Object.assign(route.options, options)
  2848→        })
  2849→      } else {
  2850→        route._lazyPromise = Promise.resolve()
  2851→      }
  2852→    }
  2853→
  2854→    // If for some reason lazy resolves more lazy components...
  2855→    // We'll wait for that before pre attempt to preload any
  2856→    // components themselves.
  2857→    if (route._componentsPromise === undefined) {
  2858→      route._componentsPromise = route._lazyPromise.then(() =>
  2859→        Promise.all(
  2860→          componentTypes.map(async (type) => {
  2861→            const component = route.options[type]
  2862→            if ((component as any)?.preload) {
  2863→              await (component as any).preload()
  2864→            }
  2865→          }),
  2866→        ),
  2867→      )
  2868→    }
  2869→    return route._componentsPromise
  2870→  }
  2871→
  2872→  preloadRoute: PreloadRouteFn<
  2873→    TRouteTree,
  2874→    TTrailingSlashOption,
  2875→    TDefaultStructuralSharingOption,
  2876→    TRouterHistory
  2877→  > = async (opts) => {
  2878→    const next = this.buildLocation(opts as any)
  2879→
  2880→    let matches = this.matchRoutes(next, {
  2881→      throwOnError: true,
  2882→      preload: true,
  2883→      dest: opts,
  2884→    })
  2885→
  2886→    const activeMatchIds = new Set(
  2887→      [...this.state.matches, ...(this.state.pendingMatches ?? [])].map(
  2888→        (d) => d.id,
  2889→      ),
  2890→    )
  2891→
  2892→    const loadedMatchIds = new Set([
  2893→      ...activeMatchIds,
  2894→      ...this.state.cachedMatches.map((d) => d.id),
  2895→    ])
  2896→
  2897→    // If the matches are already loaded, we need to add them to the cachedMatches
  2898→    batch(() => {
  2899→      matches.forEach((match) => {
  2900→        if (!loadedMatchIds.has(match.id)) {
  2901→          this.__store.setState((s) => ({
  2902→            ...s,
  2903→            cachedMatches: [...(s.cachedMatches as any), match],
  2904→          }))
  2905→        }
  2906→      })
  2907→    })
  2908→
  2909→    try {
  2910→      matches = await this.loadMatches({
  2911→        matches,
  2912→        location: next,
  2913→        preload: true,
  2914→        updateMatch: (id, updater) => {
  2915→          // Don't update the match if it's currently loaded
  2916→          if (activeMatchIds.has(id)) {
  2917→            matches = matches.map((d) => (d.id === id ? updater(d) : d))
  2918→          } else {
  2919→            this.updateMatch(id, updater)
  2920→          }
  2921→        },
  2922→      })
  2923→
  2924→      return matches
  2925→    } catch (err) {
  2926→      if (isRedirect(err)) {
  2927→        if (err.options.reloadDocument) {
  2928→          return undefined
  2929→        }
  2930→
  2931→        return await this.preloadRoute({
  2932→          ...err.options,
  2933→          _fromLocation: next,
  2934→        })
  2935→      }
  2936→      if (!isNotFound(err)) {
  2937→        // Preload errors are not fatal, but we should still log them
  2938→        console.error(err)
  2939→      }
  2940→      return undefined
  2941→    }
  2942→  }
  2943→
  2944→  matchRoute: MatchRouteFn<
  2945→    TRouteTree,
  2946→    TTrailingSlashOption,
  2947→    TDefaultStructuralSharingOption,
  2948→    TRouterHistory
  2949→  > = (location, opts) => {
  2950→    const matchLocation = {
  2951→      ...location,
  2952→      to: location.to
  2953→        ? this.resolvePathWithBase(
  2954→            (location.from || '') as string,
  2955→            location.to as string,
  2956→          )
  2957→        : undefined,
  2958→      params: location.params || {},
  2959→      leaveParams: true,
  2960→    }
  2961→    const next = this.buildLocation(matchLocation as any)
  2962→
  2963→    if (opts?.pending && this.state.status !== 'pending') {
  2964→      return false
  2965→    }
  2966→
  2967→    const pending =
  2968→      opts?.pending === undefined ? !this.state.isLoading : opts.pending
  2969→
  2970→    const baseLocation = pending
  2971→      ? this.latestLocation
  2972→      : this.state.resolvedLocation || this.state.location
  2973→
  2974→    const match = matchPathname(this.basepath, baseLocation.pathname, {
  2975→      ...opts,
  2976→      to: next.pathname,
  2977→    }) as any
  2978→
  2979→    if (!match) {
  2980→      return false
  2981→    }
  2982→    if (location.params) {
  2983→      if (!deepEqual(match, location.params, { partial: true })) {
  2984→        return false
  2985→      }
  2986→    }
  2987→
  2988→    if (match && (opts?.includeSearch ?? true)) {
  2989→      return deepEqual(baseLocation.search, next.search, { partial: true })
  2990→        ? match
  2991→        : false
  2992→    }
  2993→
  2994→    return match
  2995→  }
  2996→
  2997→  ssr?: {
  2998→    manifest: Manifest | undefined
  2999→  }
  3000→
  3001→  serverSsr?: ServerSsr
  3002→
  3003→  _handleNotFound = (
  3004→    matches: Array<AnyRouteMatch>,
  3005→    err: NotFoundError,
  3006→    {
  3007→      updateMatch = this.updateMatch,
  3008→    }: {
  3009→      updateMatch?: (
  3010→        id: string,
  3011→        updater: (match: AnyRouteMatch) => AnyRouteMatch,
  3012→      ) => void
  3013→    } = {},
  3014→  ) => {
  3015→    // Find the route that should handle the not found error
  3016→    // First check if a specific route is requested to show the error
  3017→    const routeCursor = this.routesById[err.routeId ?? ''] ?? this.routeTree
  3018→    const matchesByRouteId: Record<string, AnyRouteMatch> = {}
  3019→
  3020→    // Setup routesByRouteId object for quick access
  3021→    for (const match of matches) {
  3022→      matchesByRouteId[match.routeId] = match
  3023→    }
  3024→
  3025→    // Ensure a NotFoundComponent exists on the route
  3026→    if (
  3027→      !routeCursor.options.notFoundComponent &&
  3028→      (this.options as any)?.defaultNotFoundComponent
  3029→    ) {
  3030→      routeCursor.options.notFoundComponent = (
  3031→        this.options as any
  3032→      ).defaultNotFoundComponent
  3033→    }
  3034→
  3035→    // Ensure we have a notFoundComponent
  3036→    invariant(
  3037→      routeCursor.options.notFoundComponent,
  3038→      'No notFoundComponent found. Please set a notFoundComponent on your route or provide a defaultNotFoundComponent to the router.',
  3039→    )
  3040→
  3041→    // Find the match for this route
  3042→    const matchForRoute = matchesByRouteId[routeCursor.id]
  3043→
  3044→    invariant(
  3045→      matchForRoute,
  3046→      'Could not find match for route: ' + routeCursor.id,
  3047→    )
  3048→
  3049→    // Assign the error to the match - using non-null assertion since we've checked with invariant
  3050→    updateMatch(matchForRoute.id, (prev) => ({
  3051→      ...prev,
  3052→      status: 'notFound',
  3053→      error: err,
  3054→      isFetching: false,
  3055→    }))
  3056→
  3057→    if ((err as any).routerCode === 'BEFORE_LOAD' && routeCursor.parentRoute) {
  3058→      err.routeId = routeCursor.parentRoute.id
  3059→      this._handleNotFound(matches, err, {
  3060→        updateMatch,
  3061→      })
  3062→    }
  3063→  }
  3064→
  3065→  hasNotFoundMatch = () => {
  3066→    return this.__store.state.matches.some(
  3067→      (d) => d.status === 'notFound' || d.globalNotFound,
  3068→    )
  3069→  }
  3070→}

  3074→export class PathParamError extends Error {}

  3076→const normalize = (str: string) =>
  3077→  str.endsWith('/') && str.length > 1 ? str.slice(0, -1) : str
  3078→function comparePaths(a: string, b: string) {

  3082→// A function that takes an import() argument which is a function and returns a new function that will
  3083→// proxy arguments from the caller to the imported function, retaining all type
  3084→// information along the way
  3085→export function lazyFn<
  3086→  T extends Record<string, (...args: Array<any>) => any>,
  3087→  TKey extends keyof T = 'default',
  3088→>(fn: () => Promise<T>, key?: TKey) {
  3089→  return async (
  3090→    ...args: Parameters<T[TKey]>
  3091→  ): Promise<Awaited<ReturnType<T[TKey]>>> => {
  3092→    const imported = await fn()
  3093→    return imported[key || 'default'](...args)
  3094→  }
  3095→}

  3097→export function getInitialRouterState(
  3098→  location: ParsedLocation,
  3099→): RouterState<any> {
  3100→  return {
  3101→    loadedAt: 0,
  3102→    isLoading: false,
  3103→    isTransitioning: false,
  3104→    status: 'idle',
  3105→    resolvedLocation: undefined,
  3106→    location,
  3107→    matches: [],
  3108→    pendingMatches: [],
  3109→    cachedMatches: [],
  3110→    statusCode: 200,
  3111→  }
  3112→}
  3113→
  3114→function validateSearch(validateSearch: AnyValidator, input: unknown): unknown {
  3115→  if (validateSearch == null) return {}
  3116→
  3117→  if ('~standard' in validateSearch) {
  3118→    const result = validateSearch['~standard'].validate(input)
  3119→
  3120→    if (result instanceof Promise)
  3121→      throw new SearchParamError('Async validation not supported')
  3122→
  3123→    if (result.issues)
  3124→      throw new SearchParamError(JSON.stringify(result.issues, undefined, 2), {
  3125→        cause: result,
  3126→      })
  3127→
  3128→    return result.value
  3129→  }
  3130→
  3131→  if ('parse' in validateSearch) {
  3132→    return validateSearch.parse(input)
  3133→  }
  3134→
  3135→  if (typeof validateSearch === 'function') {
  3136→    return validateSearch(input)
  3137→  }
  3138→
  3139→  return {}
  3140→}

  3142→export const componentTypes = [
  3143→  'component',
  3144→  'errorComponent',
  3145→  'pendingComponent',
  3146→  'notFoundComponent',

  3149→function routeNeedsPreload(route: AnyRoute) {
  3150→  for (const componentType of componentTypes) {
  3151→    if ((route.options[componentType] as any)?.preload) {
  3152→      return true
  3153→    }
  3154→  }
  3155→  return false
  3156→}

  3158→interface RouteLike {
  3159→  id: string
  3160→  isRoot?: boolean
  3161→  path?: string
  3162→  fullPath: string
  3163→  rank?: number
  3164→  parentRoute?: RouteLike
  3165→  children?: Array<RouteLike>
  3166→  options?: {
  3167→    caseSensitive?: boolean
  3168→  }

  3170→
  3171→export type ProcessRouteTreeResult<TRouteLike extends RouteLike> = {
  3172→  routesById: Record<string, TRouteLike>
  3173→  routesByPath: Record<string, TRouteLike>
  3174→  flatRoutes: Array<TRouteLike>
  3175→}
  3176→
  3177→const REQUIRED_PARAM_BASE_SCORE = 0.5
  3178→const OPTIONAL_PARAM_BASE_SCORE = 0.4
  3179→const WILDCARD_PARAM_BASE_SCORE = 0.25
  3180→
  3181→function handleParam(segment: Segment, baseScore: number) {
  3182→  if (segment.prefixSegment && segment.suffixSegment) {
  3183→    return baseScore + 0.05
  3184→  }
  3185→
  3186→  if (segment.prefixSegment) {
  3187→    return baseScore + 0.02
  3188→  }
  3189→
  3190→  if (segment.suffixSegment) {
  3191→    return baseScore + 0.01
  3192→  }
  3193→
  3194→  return baseScore
  3195→}
  3196→
  3197→export function processRouteTree<TRouteLike extends RouteLike>({
  3198→  routeTree,
  3199→  initRoute,
  3200→}: {
  3201→  routeTree: TRouteLike
  3202→  initRoute?: (route: TRouteLike, index: number) => void
  3203→}): ProcessRouteTreeResult<TRouteLike> {
  3204→  const routesById = {} as Record<string, TRouteLike>
  3205→  const routesByPath = {} as Record<string, TRouteLike>
  3206→
  3207→  const recurseRoutes = (childRoutes: Array<TRouteLike>) => {
  3208→    childRoutes.forEach((childRoute, i) => {
  3209→      initRoute?.(childRoute, i)
  3210→
  3211→      const existingRoute = routesById[childRoute.id]
  3212→
  3213→      invariant(
  3214→        !existingRoute,
  3215→        `Duplicate routes found with id: ${String(childRoute.id)}`,
  3216→      )
  3217→
  3218→      routesById[childRoute.id] = childRoute
  3219→
  3220→      if (!childRoute.isRoot && childRoute.path) {
  3221→        const trimmedFullPath = trimPathRight(childRoute.fullPath)
  3222→        if (
  3223→          !routesByPath[trimmedFullPath] ||
  3224→          childRoute.fullPath.endsWith('/')
  3225→        ) {
  3226→          routesByPath[trimmedFullPath] = childRoute
  3227→        }
  3228→      }
  3229→
  3230→      const children = childRoute.children as Array<TRouteLike>
  3231→
  3232→      if (children?.length) {
  3233→        recurseRoutes(children)
  3234→      }
  3235→    })
  3236→  }
  3237→
  3238→  recurseRoutes([routeTree])
  3239→
  3240→  const scoredRoutes: Array<{
  3241→    child: TRouteLike
  3242→    trimmed: string
  3243→    parsed: ReadonlyArray<Segment>
  3244→    index: number
  3245→    scores: Array<number>
  3246→    hasStaticAfter: boolean
  3247→    optionalParamCount: number
  3248→  }> = []
  3249→
  3250→  const routes: Array<TRouteLike> = Object.values(routesById)
  3251→
  3252→  routes.forEach((d, i) => {
  3253→    if (d.isRoot || !d.path) {
  3254→      return
  3255→    }
  3256→
  3257→    const trimmed = trimPathLeft(d.fullPath)
  3258→    let parsed = parsePathname(trimmed)
  3259→
  3260→    // Removes the leading slash if it is not the only remaining segment
  3261→    let skip = 0
  3262→    while (parsed.length > skip + 1 && parsed[skip]?.value === '/') {
  3263→      skip++
  3264→    }
  3265→    if (skip > 0) parsed = parsed.slice(skip)
  3266→
  3267→    let optionalParamCount = 0
  3268→    let hasStaticAfter = false
  3269→    const scores = parsed.map((segment, index) => {
  3270→      if (segment.value === '/') {
  3271→        return 0.75
  3272→      }
  3273→
  3274→      let baseScore: number | undefined = undefined
  3275→      if (segment.type === SEGMENT_TYPE_PARAM) {
  3276→        baseScore = REQUIRED_PARAM_BASE_SCORE
  3277→      } else if (segment.type === SEGMENT_TYPE_OPTIONAL_PARAM) {
  3278→        baseScore = OPTIONAL_PARAM_BASE_SCORE
  3279→        optionalParamCount++
  3280→      } else if (segment.type === SEGMENT_TYPE_WILDCARD) {
  3281→        baseScore = WILDCARD_PARAM_BASE_SCORE
  3282→      }
  3283→
  3284→      if (baseScore) {
  3285→        // if there is any static segment (that is not an index) after a required / optional param,
  3286→        // we will boost this param so it ranks higher than a required/optional param without a static segment after it
  3287→        // JUST FOR SORTING, NOT FOR MATCHING
  3288→        for (let i = index + 1; i < parsed.length; i++) {
  3289→          const nextSegment = parsed[i]!
  3290→          if (
  3291→            nextSegment.type === SEGMENT_TYPE_PATHNAME &&
  3292→            nextSegment.value !== '/'
  3293→          ) {
  3294→            hasStaticAfter = true
  3295→            return handleParam(segment, baseScore + 0.2)
  3296→          }
  3297→        }
  3298→
  3299→        return handleParam(segment, baseScore)
  3300→      }
  3301→
  3302→      return 1
  3303→    })
  3304→
  3305→    scoredRoutes.push({
  3306→      child: d,
  3307→      trimmed,
  3308→      parsed,
  3309→      index: i,
  3310→      scores,
  3311→      optionalParamCount,
  3312→      hasStaticAfter,
  3313→    })
  3314→  })
  3315→
  3316→  const flatRoutes = scoredRoutes
  3317→    .sort((a, b) => {
  3318→      const minLength = Math.min(a.scores.length, b.scores.length)
  3319→
  3320→      // Sort by segment-by-segment score comparison ONLY for the common prefix
  3321→      for (let i = 0; i < minLength; i++) {
  3322→        if (a.scores[i] !== b.scores[i]) {
  3323→          return b.scores[i]! - a.scores[i]!
  3324→        }
  3325→      }
  3326→
  3327→      // If all common segments have equal scores, then consider length and specificity
  3328→      if (a.scores.length !== b.scores.length) {
  3329→        // If different number of optional parameters, fewer optional parameters wins (more specific)
  3330→        // only if both or none of the routes has static segments after the params
  3331→        if (a.optionalParamCount !== b.optionalParamCount) {
  3332→          if (a.hasStaticAfter === b.hasStaticAfter) {
  3333→            return a.optionalParamCount - b.optionalParamCount
  3334→          } else if (a.hasStaticAfter && !b.hasStaticAfter) {
  3335→            return -1
  3336→          } else if (!a.hasStaticAfter && b.hasStaticAfter) {
  3337→            return 1
  3338→          }
  3339→        }
  3340→
  3341→        // If same number of optional parameters, longer path wins (for static segments)
  3342→        return b.scores.length - a.scores.length
  3343→      }
  3344→
  3345→      // Sort by min available parsed value for alphabetical ordering
  3346→      for (let i = 0; i < minLength; i++) {
  3347→        if (a.parsed[i]!.value !== b.parsed[i]!.value) {
  3348→          return a.parsed[i]!.value > b.parsed[i]!.value ? 1 : -1
  3349→        }
  3350→      }
  3351→
  3352→      // Sort by original index
  3353→      return a.index - b.index
  3354→    })
  3355→    .map((d, i) => {
  3356→      d.child.rank = i
  3357→      return d.child
  3358→    })
  3359→
  3360→  return { routesById, routesByPath, flatRoutes }
  3361→}
  3362→
  3363→export function getMatchedRoutes<TRouteLike extends RouteLike>({
  3364→  pathname,
  3365→  routePathname,
  3366→  basepath,
  3367→  caseSensitive,
  3368→  routesByPath,
  3369→  routesById,
  3370→  flatRoutes,
  3371→}: {
  3372→  pathname: string
  3373→  routePathname?: string
  3374→  basepath: string
  3375→  caseSensitive?: boolean
  3376→  routesByPath: Record<string, TRouteLike>
  3377→  routesById: Record<string, TRouteLike>
  3378→  flatRoutes: Array<TRouteLike>
  3379→}) {
  3380→  let routeParams: Record<string, string> = {}
  3381→  const trimmedPath = trimPathRight(pathname)
  3382→  const getMatchedParams = (route: TRouteLike) => {
  3383→    const result = matchPathname(basepath, trimmedPath, {
  3384→      to: route.fullPath,
  3385→      caseSensitive: route.options?.caseSensitive ?? caseSensitive,
  3386→      // we need fuzzy matching for `notFoundMode: 'fuzzy'`
  3387→      fuzzy: true,
  3388→    })
  3389→    return result
  3390→  }
  3391→
  3392→  let foundRoute: TRouteLike | undefined =
  3393→    routePathname !== undefined ? routesByPath[routePathname] : undefined
  3394→  if (foundRoute) {
  3395→    routeParams = getMatchedParams(foundRoute)!
  3396→  } else {
  3397→    // iterate over flatRoutes to find the best match
  3398→    // if we find a fuzzy matching route, keep looking for a perfect fit
  3399→    let fuzzyMatch:
  3400→      | { foundRoute: TRouteLike; routeParams: Record<string, string> }
  3401→      | undefined = undefined
  3402→    for (const route of flatRoutes) {
  3403→      const matchedParams = getMatchedParams(route)
  3404→
  3405→      if (matchedParams) {
  3406→        if (
  3407→          route.path !== '/' &&
  3408→          (matchedParams as Record<string, string>)['**']
  3409→        ) {
  3410→          if (!fuzzyMatch) {
  3411→            fuzzyMatch = { foundRoute: route, routeParams: matchedParams }
  3412→          }
  3413→        } else {
  3414→          foundRoute = route
  3415→          routeParams = matchedParams
  3416→          break
  3417→        }
  3418→      }
  3419→    }
  3420→    // did not find a perfect fit, so take the fuzzy matching route if it exists
  3421→    if (!foundRoute && fuzzyMatch) {
  3422→      foundRoute = fuzzyMatch.foundRoute
  3423→      routeParams = fuzzyMatch.routeParams
  3424→    }
  3425→  }
  3426→
  3427→  let routeCursor: TRouteLike = foundRoute || routesById[rootRouteId]!
  3428→
  3429→  const matchedRoutes: Array<TRouteLike> = [routeCursor]
  3430→
  3431→  while (routeCursor.parentRoute) {
  3432→    routeCursor = routeCursor.parentRoute as TRouteLike
  3433→    matchedRoutes.push(routeCursor)
  3434→  }
  3435→  matchedRoutes.reverse()
  3436→
  3437→  return { matchedRoutes, routeParams, foundRoute }
  3438→}
  3439→
  3440→function applySearchMiddleware({
  3441→  search,
  3442→  dest,
  3443→  destRoutes,
  3444→  _includeValidateSearch,
  3445→}: {
  3446→  search: any
  3447→  dest: BuildNextOptions
  3448→  destRoutes: Array<AnyRoute>
  3449→  _includeValidateSearch: boolean | undefined
  3450→}) {
  3451→  const allMiddlewares =
  3452→    destRoutes.reduce(
  3453→      (acc, route) => {
  3454→        const middlewares: Array<SearchMiddleware<any>> = []
  3455→
  3456→        if ('search' in route.options) {
  3457→          if (route.options.search?.middlewares) {
  3458→            middlewares.push(...route.options.search.middlewares)
  3459→          }
  3460→        }
  3461→        // TODO remove preSearchFilters and postSearchFilters in v2
  3462→        else if (
  3463→          route.options.preSearchFilters ||
  3464→          route.options.postSearchFilters
  3465→        ) {
  3466→          const legacyMiddleware: SearchMiddleware<any> = ({
  3467→            search,
  3468→            next,
  3469→          }) => {
  3470→            let nextSearch = search
  3471→
  3472→            if (
  3473→              'preSearchFilters' in route.options &&
  3474→              route.options.preSearchFilters
  3475→            ) {
  3476→              nextSearch = route.options.preSearchFilters.reduce(
  3477→                (prev, next) => next(prev),
  3478→                search,
  3479→              )
  3480→            }
  3481→
  3482→            const result = next(nextSearch)
  3483→
  3484→            if (
  3485→              'postSearchFilters' in route.options &&
  3486→              route.options.postSearchFilters
  3487→            ) {
  3488→              return route.options.postSearchFilters.reduce(
  3489→                (prev, next) => next(prev),
  3490→                result,
  3491→              )
  3492→            }
  3493→
  3494→            return result
  3495→          }
  3496→          middlewares.push(legacyMiddleware)
  3497→        }
  3498→
  3499→        if (_includeValidateSearch && route.options.validateSearch) {
  3500→          const validate: SearchMiddleware<any> = ({ search, next }) => {
  3501→            const result = next(search)
  3502→            try {
  3503→              const validatedSearch = {
  3504→                ...result,
  3505→                ...(validateSearch(route.options.validateSearch, result) ?? {}),
  3506→              }
  3507→              return validatedSearch
  3508→            } catch {
  3509→              // ignore errors here because they are already handled in matchRoutes
  3510→              return result
  3511→            }
  3512→          }
  3513→
  3514→          middlewares.push(validate)
  3515→        }
  3516→
  3517→        return acc.concat(middlewares)
  3518→      },
  3519→      [] as Array<SearchMiddleware<any>>,
  3520→    ) ?? []
  3521→
  3522→  // the chain ends here since `next` is not called
  3523→  const final: SearchMiddleware<any> = ({ search }) => {
  3524→    if (!dest.search) {
  3525→      return {}
  3526→    }
  3527→    if (dest.search === true) {
  3528→      return search
  3529→    }
  3530→    return functionalUpdate(dest.search, search)
  3531→  }
  3532→
  3533→  allMiddlewares.push(final)
  3534→
  3535→  const applyNext = (index: number, currentSearch: any): any => {
  3536→    // no more middlewares left, return the current search
  3537→    if (index >= allMiddlewares.length) {
  3538→      return currentSearch
  3539→    }
  3540→
  3541→    const middleware = allMiddlewares[index]!
  3542→
  3543→    const next = (newSearch: any): any => {
  3544→      return applyNext(index + 1, newSearch)
  3545→    }
  3546→
  3547→    return middleware({ search: currentSearch, next })
  3548→  }
  3549→
  3550→  // Start applying middlewares
  3551→  return applyNext(0, search)
  3552→}
  3553→

import { Store, batch } from '@tanstack/store'
import {
  createBrowserHistory,
  createMemoryHistory,
  parseHref,
} from '@tanstack/history'
import invariant from 'tiny-invariant'
import {
  createControlledPromise,
  deepEqual,
  functionalUpdate,
  last,
  pick,
  replaceEqualDeep,
} from './utils'
import {
  SEGMENT_TYPE_OPTIONAL_PARAM,
  SEGMENT_TYPE_PARAM,
  SEGMENT_TYPE_PATHNAME,
  SEGMENT_TYPE_WILDCARD,
  cleanPath,
  interpolatePath,
  joinPaths,
  matchPathname,
  parsePathname,
  resolvePath,
  trimPath,
  trimPathLeft,
  trimPathRight,
} from './path'
import { isNotFound } from './not-found'
import { setupScrollRestoration } from './scroll-restoration'
import { defaultParseSearch, defaultStringifySearch } from './searchParams'
import { rootRouteId } from './root'
import { isRedirect, redirect } from './redirect'
import type { Segment } from './path'
import type { SearchParser, SearchSerializer } from './searchParams'
import type { AnyRedirect, ResolvedRedirect } from './redirect'
import type {
  HistoryLocation,
  HistoryState,
  ParsedHistoryState,
  RouterHistory,
} from '@tanstack/history'
import type {
  Awaitable,
  ControlledPromise,
  NoInfer,
  NonNullableUpdater,
  PickAsRequired,
  Updater,
} from './utils'
import type { ParsedLocation } from './location'
import type {
  AnyContext,
  AnyRoute,
  AnyRouteWithContext,
  BeforeLoadContextOptions,
  LoaderFnContext,
  MakeRemountDepsOptionsUnion,
  RouteContextOptions,
  RouteMask,
  SearchMiddleware,
  SsrContextOptions,
} from './route'
import type {
  FullSearchSchema,
  RouteById,
  RoutePaths,
  RoutesById,
  RoutesByPath,
} from './routeInfo'
import type {
  AnyRouteMatch,
  MakeRouteMatch,
  MakeRouteMatchUnion,
  MatchRouteOptions,
} from './Matches'
import type {
  BuildLocationFn,
  CommitLocationOptions,
  NavigateFn,
} from './RouterProvider'
import type { Manifest } from './manifest'
import type { AnySchema, AnyValidator } from './validators'
import type { NavigateOptions, ResolveRelativePath, ToOptions } from './link'
import type { NotFoundError } from './not-found'

export type ControllablePromise<T = any> = Promise<T> & {
  resolve: (value: T) => void
  reject: (value?: any) => void
}

export type InjectedHtmlEntry = Promise<string>

export interface DefaultRegister {
  router: AnyRouter
}

export interface Register extends DefaultRegister {
  // router: Router
}

export type RegisteredRouter = Register['router']

export type DefaultRemountDepsFn<TRouteTree extends AnyRoute> = (
  opts: MakeRemountDepsOptionsUnion<TRouteTree>,
) => any

export interface DefaultRouterOptionsExtensions {}

export interface RouterOptionsExtensions
  extends DefaultRouterOptionsExtensions {}

export interface RouterOptions<
  TRouteTree extends AnyRoute,
  TTrailingSlashOption extends TrailingSlashOption,
  TDefaultStructuralSharingOption extends boolean = false,
  TRouterHistory extends RouterHistory = RouterHistory,
  TDehydrated extends Record<string, any> = Record<string, any>,
> extends RouterOptionsExtensions {
  /**
   * The history object that will be used to manage the browser history.
   *
   * If not provided, a new createBrowserHistory instance will be created and used.
   *
   * @link [API Docs](https://tanstack.com/router/latest/docs/framework/react/api/router/RouterOptionsType#history-property)
   * @link [Guide](https://tanstack.com/router/latest/docs/framework/react/guide/history-types)
   */
  history?: TRouterHistory
  /**
   * A function that will be used to stringify search params when generating links.
   *
   * @default defaultStringifySearch
   * @link [API Docs](https://tanstack.com/router/latest/docs/framework/react/api/router/RouterOptionsType#stringifysearch-method)
   * @link [Guide](https://tanstack.com/router/latest/docs/framework/react/guide/custom-search-param-serialization)
   */
  stringifySearch?: SearchSerializer
  /**
   * A function that will be used to parse search params when parsing the current location.
   *
   * @default defaultParseSearch
   * @link [API Docs](https://tanstack.com/router/latest/docs/framework/react/api/router/RouterOptionsType#parsesearch-method)
   * @link [Guide](https://tanstack.com/router/latest/docs/framework/react/guide/custom-search-param-serialization)
   */
  parseSearch?: SearchParser
  /**
   * If `false`, routes will not be preloaded by default in any way.
   *
   * If `'intent'`, routes will be preloaded by default when the user hovers over a link or a `touchstart` event is detected on a `<Link>`.
   *
   * If `'viewport'`, routes will be preloaded by default when they are within the viewport.
   *
   * @default false
   * @link [API Docs](https://tanstack.com/router/latest/docs/framework/react/api/router/RouterOptionsType#defaultpreload-property)
   * @link [Guide](https://tanstack.com/router/latest/docs/framework/react/guide/preloading)
   */
  defaultPreload?: false | 'intent' | 'viewport' | 'render'
  /**
   * The delay in milliseconds that a route must be hovered over or touched before it is preloaded.
   *
   * @default 50
   * @link [API Docs](https://tanstack.com/router/latest/docs/framework/react/api/router/RouterOptionsType#defaultpreloaddelay-property)
   * @link [Guide](https://tanstack.com/router/latest/docs/framework/react/guide/preloading#preload-delay)
   */
  defaultPreloadDelay?: number
  /**
   * The default `preloadIntentProximity` a route should use if no preloadIntentProximity is provided.
   *
   * @default 0
   * @link [API Docs](https://tanstack.com/router/latest/docs/framework/react/api/router/RouterOptionsType#defaultpreloadintentproximity-property)
